resources.string: Setup, help, info and diagnostic tools
Sign in with Bosch SingleKey ID
Sign in here with your Bosch SingleKey ID, similar to the eBike Flow app. If you already have a SingleKey ID, you can use it directly.
This is where app settings live that directly affect export and usage.
The initial value depends on the system language. You can override it here permanently.
Typical for languages with decimal commas, e.g. German.
Typical for languages with decimal points, e.g. English.
Quick overview of navigation, data flow and diagnostics.
Sign-in uses Bosch SingleKey ID and Bosch eBike Data Act access. After successful sign-in, the app opens the main navigation.
The tour list loads locally cached activities first and refreshes in the background when needed. Filters, sorting and search operate directly on the loaded list.
The bike area also shows Bosch Smart System components, batteries and detail information cache-first from Room.
CSV exports use either the visible activity set or the full fetch and then open the Android share sheet.
The API test screen remains available as a diagnostic tool and is intentionally not part of the primary navigation.
Version, license, library and credit information for the app.
Bosch eBike Systems provides the Smart System, the related cloud interfaces and thus the technical foundation for the ride and bike data shown in this app.

The EU Data Act, Regulation (EU) 2023/2854, defines harmonised rules for fair access to and fair use of product and service data and therefore forms the regulatory framework for data access of this kind.
Codex by OpenAI is an agentic software engineering assistant that can read codebases, make changes, run tests and execute tasks in isolated environments.
Claude Code by Anthropic is an agentic coding system for terminal, IDE and web that can plan across projects, edit files, run tests and use development tools directly.
Gemini CLI by Google is an open source AI agent for the terminal that brings Gemini into the command line for coding, research, automation and problem solving.
The start page bundles the latest ride dataset, bike status and recent export results.
Cloud sync reloads all activity pages and the bike list into the Room cache.
After the first successful sync, the latest loaded activity appears here.
No bike data in cache yet.
